title: cyclophorus ceylanicus
intro: Cyclophorus ceylanicus, a type of terrestrial orchid, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its unique, funnel-shaped flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclophorus ceylanicus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of powder or decoction, and is also used as a component in various Ayurvedic formulations and tonics.
